non_goals: do not pretend the full coder-ready factory blueprint is complete
do not treat old runtime files as current authority by default
do not widen this mission into full factory implementation
success_criteria: another model can resume from the reboot workspace without rereading the whole thread
parts-car keep/adapt/reject truth is recorded in one manifest
first real BPB mission artifacts are checked in
failure_criteria: workspace does not clearly show current state
cold model still has to reconstruct salvage truth from scattered docs
mission pack is missing or ambiguous
tradeoffs: bootstrap continuity first, full coder-ready pack second

authority.coder: not yet final execution authority for the whole rebuild

escalation.rule: do not escalate bootstrap continuity questions to founder once mission starts

existing_assets: old system codebase as parts car
risk_register: full machine-ready blueprint not yet created
legacy naming drift may still exist in source references
founder_decision_log: BPB role assigned to current session
reboot repo must show where models left off
good code from the old system should be reused where safe
dependency_map: old runtime services and routes listed in PARTS_CAR_MANIFEST.json

change_control.rule: subsequent missions extend this workspace; they do not replace bootstrap history
